title: Decision to Leave
tmdbOverview: From a mountain peak in South Korea, a man plummets to his death. Did he jump, or was he pushed? When detective Hae-joon arrives on the scene, he begins to suspect the dead man’s wife Seo-rae. But as he digs deeper into the investigation, he finds himself trapped in a web of deception and desire.
synopsis: Decision to Leave is a 2022 thriller, mystery and romance film from South Korea. It holds a solid 7.3 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a M certification (AU rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
